{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321182027C239D843695DB4C0C7AB"}"},"total":3303},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7240759313793975092","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太喜欢这本书了，第一个在种田逃荒文里爱上的男主，女主也超喜欢既有善心又不圣母，简直完美契合我的三观，一家人都特别好，没有那种一章接着一章的极品，反倒是家人之间的温馨特别让人治愈，互相信任，在空间里玩这个时代没有的手机平板看电视，温馨又幸福，世外桃源的家，足够造反的物资，男主有担当爱护家人，有血海深仇但从未被仇恨蒙蔽住双眼，真是又爽又温馨的文，找不出第二本。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685870731,"group_id":"7194461493599931448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"洛阳亲友如相问，一片冰心在玉壶。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0WJMgX+7NMZO/6uqj0B8Vxk2RoKT8HU5Jrr1UQIiToX","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/62843599b8c1429da31a3ab2c00f08ba~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624043&x-signature=nTgJqPDWeu%2BcEbE7UTR2LW1aj5Q%3D","user_id":"2111509299213655","user_name":"苏音儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2111509299213655","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776652495,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7194461493599931448","book_info":{"abstract":"(架空历史+空间＋逃荒战乱＋夺江山＋杀伐果断＋少许宫斗)
叶雨桐穿越了！
穿到大学室友曾经写的一本小说里，而且还是不知名朝代的灾荒战乱年间。
原书的女主是她堂姐，而她是和堂姐争夺男主的恶毒女配，被啪啪打脸不说，家人也受她的牵连，最后全家都被男主和女主给弄死了。
穿越过来的叶雨桐不屑的想，后面三年的灾荒，十年的战乱，不赶快找个地方躲起来，却整天想着抢男人？这是离了男人不能活了吗？
再说了，不就是一个侯府的公子？有什么好抢的？真没出息！看那不值钱的样。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4ae706a124e9272cb6a17a6822f75c48","author":"平淡生活","author_id":"","book_id":"7194461493599931448","book_name":"都要去逃荒了，谁还惯着你们","book_short_name":"从农女到皇后","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#184048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":557,"name":"逃荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=557&name=逃荒&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7194463400288584244","read_count":"36061","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1017742"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"476","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,空间,穿书,虐渣,今穿古,打脸,逃荒","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f09a1025cd8b78181146220fc25ee164~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779272427&x-signature=3iqa8DqGc0qEm9xbbqNa8s0t394%3D","tomato_book_status
